events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: The legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May's Legacy
angles.copy: From iconic guitar riffs to astrophysicist, Brian May is a true legend. What's your favourite Queen track featuring his unmistakable sound?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Moves Like Jagger
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! What's your ultimate Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched 45 years ago, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV first hit screens with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released 32 years ago, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis's debut album changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, began 57 years ago in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have turned 91 today.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, the King, who would have been 91 today. His music still moves generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman and rock icon Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Timeless Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are truly timeless. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Iconic Vocals
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track he's lent his iconic vocals to?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the revolutionary first iPod 25 years ago, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years since the first iPod was unveiled! Did you have one of the originals? It certainly changed the music game!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the enduring legacy of the iconic 007 film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: A tribute to The Beatles legend and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His message of peace and incredible music continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the comedy genius John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
